memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of John Lacy Esquire Lord of Cromwellbottom
memoryArtifacts.description:
Created 05/April/1474
    Probate proved 07/June/1474
     
    Apr. 5, 1474. John Lacy of Cromwelbothum. To be buried in the parish church of Halyfax. My best beast to the Vicar of the said churc …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lacy於大約1395年出生在英國越可爾克倫威爾 博特姆時，他的父親John de Lacy49歲，母親Isabel43歲。他於1422年與Florence Molineux在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Lacy于大约1395年出生在英国越可爾克倫威爾 博特姆时，他的父亲John de Lacy49岁，母亲Isabel43岁。他于1422年与Florence Molineux在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lacy was born about 1395, in Cromwell Bottom, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Lacy, was 49 and his mother, Isabel, was 43. He married Florence Molineux in 1422, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lacy est né environ 1395, à Cromwell Bottom, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Lacy, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Florence Molineux en 1422, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lacy um 1395 in Cromwell Bottom, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Lacy 49 und seine Mutter Isabel 43. Er hat 1422 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Florence Molineux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Florence Molineux nel 1422, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolto a Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Lacyが約1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロムウエル ボットオムで生まれた時，父John de Lacyは49歳，母Isabelは43歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでFlorence Molineuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lacy(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 요르크실르 크롬웰 벗톰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Lacy(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Florence Molineux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lacy nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Cromwell Bottom, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lacy, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Florence Molineux em 1422, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Lacy родился около 1395 г. в местности кромвелл боттом, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Lacy было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence Molineux в 1422 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.
